ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the event (e.g., t, a, s, r, n) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., uint32, FLTNBDATA) */,
  "mandatory" INTEGER /* Whether the event is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the data belongs to */,
  "time_ms" INTEGER /* Time in milliseconds */,
  "attenuation" REAL /* Attenuation correction factor */,
  "scatter_intensity" REAL /* Un-normalized scatter intensity rate */,
  "random_intensity" REAL /* Un-normalized random intensity rate */,
  "normalization_factor" REAL /* Normalization factor */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the data point (e.g., instrument settings) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data point (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_data_time_ms FOREIGN KEY ("time_ms") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., uint32, FLTNBDATA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the event type (e.g., ms, V, A) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., integer, float) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the data type (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the symbol belongs to */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the event (e.g., t, a, s, r, n) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_symbols_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the event */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_versions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the collaboration belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the collaboration belongs to */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tags_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
